summary: Comprehensive testing of ACM iteration 13 features: EvalRuns grouped view, environment switcher, group API, and mandatory Group ID in RunEvalModal. All 13 requested features are working correctly.

minor.issue: Console warning about Collapsible switching between controlled/uncontrolled state when expanding groups. This is a frontend React issue, not backend.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/eval/groups/grp-13/jobs returns jobs for that group (3 jobs returned)
Backend: GET /api/eval/groups/test-group-123/jobs works correctly
Backend: Group API with pagination params (limit, offset) works
Backend: Non-existent group returns empty jobs array (200 status)
Backend: GET /api/eval/stats returns correct stats object format
Backend: GET /api/eval/jobs with status filter works
EvalRuns page: Shows collapsible group cards instead of flat job table (44 groups found)
EvalRuns page: Each group card shows group_id (grp-13, mfarm1.5, test-group-123, etc.)
EvalRuns page: Each group card shows job count badge (e.g., '3 jobs')
EvalRuns page: Each group card shows agent badges for agents in group
EvalRuns page: Each group card shows status dots/summary
EvalRuns page: Each group card shows avg score badge (e.g., 'avg 97%')
EvalRuns page: Clicking a group card expands to show individual job rows
EvalRuns page: Individual job rows show problem, agent/model badges, status, score
EvalRuns page: Job rows are clickable and navigate to job detail page
EvalRuns page: Status filter buttons (All, Queued, Running, Completed, Failed, Cancelled) work
EvalRuns page: Stats cards at top display correctly
Sidebar: Environment switcher visible with Dev/Ephemeral options
Sidebar: Selecting Dev shows cortex URL http://agentsdk.internal-staging.emergentagent.com
Sidebar: Selecting Ephemeral shows text input for eph name
Sidebar: Ephemeral with name 'builder-1' generates correct cortex URL
Run Eval Modal: Group ID field present in Configure step (step 4) and marked mandatory
Run Eval Modal: Next button disabled without Group ID on step 4
Run Eval Modal: Next button enables after entering Group ID
Run Eval Modal: Cortex URL auto-populated from environment switcher (Dev URL shown)
Run Eval Modal: Review step shows Group ID correctly
critical_code_review_comments: React Collapsible component warning: 'Collapsible is changing from uncontrolled to controlled' - Consider initializing expandedGroups with explicit values to avoid this warning
Group API endpoint properly proxies to http://harness-eval.int-worker.dev.emergentagent.com/api/v1/groups/{group_id}/evals
Environment switcher properly stores state in localStorage (acm_env, acm_eph_name)
EnvProvider correctly wraps app and provides cortexUrl via useEnv() hook
RunEvalModal correctly uses useEnv() to get cortexUrl and auto-populates expCortexUrl
seed_data_creation: None - used existing jobs and groups from Eval API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 13 features verified: EvalRuns page now shows grouped view with collapsible cards (data-testid='group-{group_id}'). Each card shows group_id, job count, agent badges, status summary, avg score. Expanding calls GET /api/eval/groups/{group_id}/jobs. Environment switcher in sidebar works with Dev/Ephemeral options, persists to localStorage. RunEvalModal has mandatory Group ID field in step 4 (data-testid='eval-group-id') that disables Next button when empty. Cortex URL auto-populates from environment switcher.
